items.title: The Protocol: Solana’s ‘Alpenglow’ upgrade is live for testing
items.summary: Also: LayerZero apology, Ronin layer-2 transition and ‘Clear Signing’

items.title: Bitcoin risks slump after hitting ‘major bear market resistance’: CryptoQuant
items.summary: Bitcoin’s rally may reverse as its price has hit a historic resistance level and traders appear to already be taking profits, said CryptoQuant in a note on Wednesday.

items.title: AI chatbot Claude helps man recover 5 Bitcoin after finding old seed phrase
items.summary: The crypto investor had Claude search through two Macs, two external hard drives, an Apple Notes export, iCloud Mail, Gmail inbox and X messages to help retrieve the Bitcoin.

items.title: Crypto Long & Short: Bitcoin vs. gold: 26% relative undervaluation
items.summary: In this week’s Crypto Long & Short Newsletter, Dovile Silenskyte provides an alternative to the “bitcoin as a risk asset” narrative. Then, Joshua de Vos shares insights and analysis on global exchanges.

items.title: Live markets: Bitcoin dips below $80,000 as producer price inflation surges to 6%
items.summary: U.S. PPI surged well above forecasts in April, reviving concerns that rising oil prices and Iran-related supply risks may feed another inflation wave.

items.title: Tokenized Treasuries hit $15 billion as bitcoin stalls, Fed rate-rise concerns build
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for May 13, 2026

items.title: Senate confirms Kevin Warsh to lead Federal Reserve
items.summary: The US Senate voted largely along party lines to confirm Kevin Warsh to lead the Fed’s Board of Governors, despite many Democrats’ concerns about the central bank’s independence.

items.title: Trailmark turns code into graphs
items.summary: We’re open-sourcing Trailmark, a library that parses source code into a queryable call graph of functions, classes, call relationships, and semantic metadata, then exposes that graph through a Python API that Claude skills can call directly. Install it now: uv pip install trailma

items.title: Bitcoin investors yanked $635 million from spot ETFs in a day. Here's what it means for price
items.summary: The single-largest outflow since late January comes as bitcoin turns lower from the 200-day moving average.

items.title: Claude helps recover $395,000 in bitcoin trapped on a computer for years
items.summary: The owner had been trying for eight weeks to brute-force the password on their current Blockchain.com wallet, testing roughly 3.5 trillion combinations using the btcrecover service on a rented computing chip.

items.title: TRUMP token down 5% as namesake handset begins shipping next week
items.summary: Trump Mobile's T1 handset appears to be a re-skinned HTC U24 with assembly done in the U.S.

items.title: Solana drops 5%, bitcoin below $80,000 as Xi warns Trump on Taiwan conflict
items.summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping warned Donald Trump of potential conflict over Taiwan during the first U.S. presidential visit to China in nearly a decade.

items.title: Bitcoin firm Nakamoto records net loss in Q1 despite sixfold revenue growth
items.summary: Nakamoto CEO David Bailey said the company is focused on scaling its Bitcoin treasury, services and trading strategies for the remainder of 2026.

items.title: US banks expect ‘slow, then fast’ shift to digitized finance: Moody's
items.summary: Traditional financial institutions are actively preparing for a surge in adoption to avoid being caught flat-footed by a sudden shift in market demand, according to Moody’s.

items.title: Only 4% of US voters consider crypto in candidate choice: Poll
items.summary: US adults are largely wary of crypto and consider it the least important policy issue when picking who to vote for, according to a poll by Politico.

items.title: Ethereum app builder Consensys has delayed its potential IPO until fall
items.summary: The MetaMask wallet builder had reportedly engaged bankers from JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs to lead the process.

items.title: Metaplanet delays preferred share listing amid challenging Japanese market structure
items.summary: CEO Simon Gerovich says regulatory and infrastructure challenges are slowing the launch of Metaplanet's perpetual preferred share.

items.title: UK parliament to probe Nigel Farage’s $6.8 million donation from crypto billionaire
items.summary: If found guilty of violating the Parliamentary code of conduct, the Reform UK party leader could be suspended from the House of Commons.

items.title: Bitcoin buyers with long-term 'conviction' surges 300% with most recent buyers sitting on profits
items.summary: Bitcoin held by so-called conviction buyers has surged to nearly 4 million BTC, a roughly 300% increase since late 2025.

items.title: Telecom giant KDDI to acquire 14.9% stake in Coincheck Group in $65 million deal
items.summary: The companies signed a business alliance for revenue sharing, referral fees and customer referrals to expand crypto access in Japan.
